channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Judge blocks part of Trump's mail-in voting restrictions
item.description: The injunction prevents creation of a national list of voters eligible for mail-in ballots.

item.title: Supreme Court allows Trump to deny asylum seekers at border
item.description: The ruling permits border agents to block migrants escaping violence and persecution.

item.title: Iran live updates: US official confirms Iranian drone struck ship in Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Delegations from the U.S. and Iran opened talks in Switzerland on Sunday.

item.title: AI is plowing through the workplace. This new group wants to help people adapt and have jobs
